MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF S.F. NETWORK MINISTRIES HOUSING CORP. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-24-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 624 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-02-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 606 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 606

DEPT 606, JDG RYAN;G.ESPINOCILLA,CLK;D.COSTELLO,CSR. C/C FOR TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. A SETTLEMENT IS REACHED AFTER LENGTHY DISCUSSIONS. TERMS ARE STATED ON THE RECORD. ALL PARTIES SIGN THE SETTLEMENT/JUDGMENT IN OPEN COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIAZZA, SAINT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2380 FOLSOM STREET, APT 3, ROOM 1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL APR-01-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES U/D DAMAGES; NO FURTHER STAYS; PLTF SHALL BE ALLOWED TO MOVE OTHER OCCUPANTS INTO DEFT'S ROOM PER PRIOR LEASE AGREEMENT; SHLD DEFT VACATE VOL ON/BEFORE 1-APR-98 5PM PLTF WILL EXECUTE THE STIP VAC & S/A JDGMT & DISM W/ PREJUD.
